title: Government Contracting Action Plan Course
description: Step-by-step path to break into federal government contracts. Based on the Federal Contracting Roadmap and 15 years of experience.

phases.name: Setup
phases.description: Foundation setup—complete once. Establish requirements for federal contracting.

modules.title: Supplier v Service Provider v Consultant

lessons.title: Supplier v Service Provider v Consultant
lessons.description: Understanding business model differences and federal contracting implications. How to setup your corporation.

lessons.title: DUNS and UEI
lessons.description: Understanding entity identifiers and the transition from DUNS to UEI.

lessons.title: Creating Professional Email
lessons.description: Setting up professional email domains and business communications.

lessons.title: How to Identify NAICS
lessons.description: Identifying and selecting appropriate NAICS codes for your business.

modules.title: How to Create a SAM.gov Profile

lessons.title: How to Create a SAM.gov Profile
lessons.description: Complete step-by-step guide to SAM.gov registration.

lessons.title: DSBS
lessons.description: Dynamic Small Business Search registration and optimization.

modules.title: Benefits / What to say to Apex Accelerator

lessons.title: Benefits / What to say to Apex Accelerator
lessons.description: Understanding Apex Accelerator services and how to engage.

modules.title: What to put on Capability Statement / Differentiators

lessons.title: What to put on Capability Statement / Differentiators
lessons.description: Creating effective capability statements and identifying differentiators.

lessons.title: How to Find Bid Opportunities
lessons.description: Using multiple sources to find federal contracting opportunities.

lessons.title: Assemble Team Based on Opportunities
lessons.description: Team formation strategies and partner selection.

lessons.title: Apply for Vendor/Supplier Credit
lessons.description: Building credit and securing vendor/supplier credit and bonding.

modules.title: Respond to Opportunity (RFP, RFQ, RFI, Task Orders)

lessons.title: Respond to Opportunity (RFP, RFQ, RFI, Task Orders)
lessons.description: Complete proposal development and submission process.

lessons.title: Evaluate Bid Results
lessons.description: Understanding results, debriefings, and continuous improvement.

modules.title: Identify Top 25 Buyers & Future Bids (NOT ON SAM)

lessons.title: Identify Top 25 Buyers & Future Bids (NOT ON SAM)
lessons.description: Researching agencies and finding opportunities before they're posted.

modules.title: Setup and Attend Meetings with Government Buyers

lessons.title: Setup and Attend Meetings with Government Buyers
lessons.description: Building relationships with contracting officers and key decision makers.

lessons.title: Attend Industry Events
lessons.description: Maximizing value from industry days, trade shows, and conferences.

lessons.title: Attend Site Visits
lessons.description: Preparing for and conducting effective site visits.

modules.title: Get on Supplier List for Top 25 Federal Suppliers

lessons.title: Get on Supplier List for Top 25 Federal Suppliers
lessons.description: Registering with prime contractors and supplier diversity programs.

modules.title: Monitor Contract Awards and Identify Sub Opportunities

lessons.description: Tracking awards, IDIQs, and subcontracting opportunities.

lessons.title: Apply for Small Business Certification
lessons.description: Understanding and applying for HUBZone, WOSB, VOSB certifications.

lessons.title: 8(a) Certification
lessons.description: Complete guide to the 8(a) Business Development Program.

lessons.title: Mentor Protégé Program
lessons.description: Finding mentors and structuring mentor-protégé relationships.

modules.title: Focus on Self Performance Capability as Differentiator

lessons.title: Focus on Self Performance Capability as Differentiator
lessons.description: Building and showcasing self-performance as competitive advantage.

lessons.title: Find Better Partners
lessons.description: Evaluating and selecting strategic partners.

lessons.description: Finding and working with mid-size mentor companies.

lessons.title: Speak at an Event
lessons.description: Building thought leadership through speaking opportunities.

lessons.description: Registering for and using required contract management systems.
